channel.title: Heart Health on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Heart Health on MinWeb

item.title: Energy Drinks and Heart Risk: A Teen’s Fatal Tragedy
item.description: A tragic wrongful death lawsuit highlights the hidden dangers of high-caffeine energy drinks and their potential to cause fatal heart risks in teenagers.

item.title: Nutrition Myths in 2026: Why You Can Stop Fearing Eggs
item.description: Stop fearing your breakfast and cut through the 2026 nutrition noise as we debunk outdated myths about eggs, cholesterol, and gluten with current science.
